commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer/security review and contributor real behavior proof are needed; the protected label and policy question make this unsuitable for automated cleanup or repair routing.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the patch can convert broad ClawHub artifact request failures into npm fallback for official plugin installs.; Review finding: [P1] Limit npm fallback to benign ClawHub artifact gaps — src/plugi... (sha=02679e703075c03115b8d9a1ab9ca6a050ac5db0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds ClawHub artifact-unavailable handling so official plugin install/update paths can fall back to npm, with tests, a changelog entry, and refreshed Codex prompt snapshots.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR diff shows any ClawHubRequestError during ClawPack download is recoded as artifact_unavailable, and fallback predicates then allow npm fallback; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer/security review and contributor real behavior proof are needed; the protected label and policy question make this unsuitable for automated cleanup or repair routing.

target.title: fix: fall back from official ClawHub artifact blocks
target.body:
Summary
- Add ClawHub artifact-unavailable handling for official plugin update/install paths.
- Fall back trusted official ClawHub updates to npm only when recorded ClawHub provenance is official `https://clawhub.ai`.
- Preserve beta-to-default fallback behavior, dry-run npm version reporting, and clean npm provenance after fallback.
- Refresh Codex prompt snapshots for current code-mode defaults on latest `main`.

Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/clawhub.test.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts`
- `eval "$(fnm env --use-on-cd)" && fnm use 24.13.0 >/dev/null && pnpm prompt:snapshots:check`
- `OPENCLAW_ADDITIONAL_BOUNDARY_SHARD=1/4 OPENCLAW_ADDITIONAL_BOUNDARY_CONCURRENCY=4 node scripts/run-additional-boundary-checks.mjs`
- `codex review --uncommitted`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: official ClawHub artifact blocks now recover through npm without switching custom ClawHub installs.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout with Node 24.13.0 for prompt snapshot generation, commit `02679e70301f3432529ab1c0d7e75a2cdb23de7e`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/clawhub.test.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: terminal output from the local OpenClaw checkout:
```text
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  216 passed (216)
Duration  6.24s
```
Observed result after fix: official ClawHub artifact errors fall back to npm, beta default fallback uses default npm spec, dry-runs report npm version, and custom ClawHub provenance remains a ClawHub error.
What was not tested: live ClawHub/network install.
target.author: steipete
